languages.text: {n}Сервочереп остается верен себе, сохраняя молчание до последнего. Возможно, он просто не любит прощания.{/n}
{n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сервочереп остается верен себе, сохраняя молчание до последнего. Возможно, он просто не любит прощания.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}
{n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}
{n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El servocráneo, fiel a sí mismo, guarda silencio hasta el último momento. Tal vez odie las despedidas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El servocráneo, fiel a sí mismo, guarda silencio hasta el último momento. Tal vez odie las despedidas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伺服头骨始终如一，直到最后一刻都保持着沉默。也许，他只是单纯讨厌道别吧。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伺服头骨始终如一，直到最后一刻都保持着沉默。也许，他只是单纯讨厌道别吧。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Fidèle à lui-même, le servocrâne garde le silence jusqu'au bout. Peut-être n'aime-t-il tout simplement pas les adieux.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Fidèle à lui-même, le servocrâne garde le silence jusqu'au bout. Peut-être n'aime-t-il tout simplement pas les adieux.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hizmelet, kendine sadık kalarak sonuna kadar suskunluğunu koruyor. Belki de vedalardan nefret ediyordur.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hizmelet, kendine sadık kalarak sonuna kadar suskunluğunu koruyor. Belki de vedalardan nefret ediyordur.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サーヴォスカルは最後まで己を貫き、ひと言も発さずにいる。おそらく、彼は単に別れというものが嫌いなのだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull remains true to himself, staying silent until the last. Perhaps he simply hates goodbyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}サーヴォスカルは最後まで己を貫き、ひと言も発さずにいる。おそらく、彼は単に別れというものが嫌いなのだろう。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Servoschädel bleibt sich treu und schweigt bis zuletzt. Möglicherweise hasst er lange Abschiede.{/n}
